case_title: MILLIE MADJIDI RESPONDENT VS. VAN NESS & FILBERT 76 GAS STATION APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL COURT JUDGMENT-SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT VAN NESS & FILBERT 76 GAS STATION AS TO RESPONDENT MADJIDI, MILLIE HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2007 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525 SMALL CLAIMS CASE NUMBER 820146
MINI-MINUTES FOR APR-12-2007 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-12-2007 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-12-2007 BY JPT ELLIOTT A. MYLES; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-12-2007 - JUDGMENT IS ORDERED IN FAVOR OF MILLIE MADJIDI AND AGAINST VAN NESS & FILBERT 76 GAS STATION IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,622.91 PRINCIPAL AND $60.00 COSTS; TOTAL: $1,682.91. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT; JPT ELLIOTT A. MYLES; NOT REPORTED; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA (D-525).

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MADJIDI, MILLIE RECOVER FROM APPELLANT VAN NESS & FILBERT 76 GAS STATION $1,622.91 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,682.91, SEE SCANNED DOC
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:38 a.m.: This cause comes on this day as previously scheduled for Trial de Novo; Respondent Millie Madjidi appears in propria persona; Appellant Van Ness & Filbert 76 Gas Station is represented with Business Owner Mr. Tri Nguyen present and appearing in propria persona this day.

10:40 a.m.: The Court commences to hear oral testimony in the cause by both Respondent and Appellant, and receives, reads and reviews all documentary evidence presented this day, concluding at 10:59 a.m.

10:59 a.m.: After hearing all oral testimony presented and after receiving all documentary evidence in the cause, the Court thereupon takes the matter under submission and informs parties they will be notified by mail.

11:00 a.m.: Court is adjourned.
